title: Dark Lord (disambiguation)
content:
'''Dark Lord''' could refer to any of the following:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Dark Lord of the Sith]] - a title used by members of the [[Sith]]
*[[Star Wars: Darth Vader (2017)|''Star Wars: Darth Vader'' (2017)]] - a [[canon]] comic series focusing on [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader]]

===Non-canon===
*[[Dark Lord]] - a title held by [[Am]] and [[Karre]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] - a title taken by the leader of the [[Sith Order]].
*[[Flint]], the Dark Lord of Belderone.
*''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' - a novel by [[James Luceno]].
*[[Dark Lord (German audio drama)|''Dark Lord'']] - the German audio drama adaptation of the Luceno novel
*[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi - Dark Lords of the Sith'']] - a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] miniseries.
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 6|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 6]] - a comic issue.
*[[Valley of the Dark Lords/Legends|Valley of the Dark Lords]] - the burial place for the Dark Lords of the Sith on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]].
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''- a [[Star Wars video games|video game]].
{{Disambig}}

|de=Dunkler Lord
|tr=Kara Lord
}}
